untranslatable_reason: Signal requires variance-adjusted explosive statistic (SMT) with sample length penalty coefficient θ ∈ [0,1], which is not available in the allowed indicator set. The core concept of penalizing sample-length bias and detecting rapid bubble signatures cannot be directly mapped to standard technical indicators. Substituted with volatility (hvol_20) and trend strength (adx_14) as contextual proxies, but this loses the mathematical rigor of the length-correction coefficient mechanism.
translation_notes: LOPEZ_DRY_3_0 describes a sophisticated statistical regime detection rule based on explosive growth detection with sample-length penalty. Core indicators (SMT with θ coefficient) are not available. Approximated with: (1) high volatility (hvol_20 > 0.02) to detect explosive moves, (2) ADX > 25 to confirm directional trending/regime, (3) context-dependent entry/exit to reflect regime-dependent nature. This is a lossy translation that captures intent but not the original statistical methodology.
